title: Drag and drop updates into items
excerpt:
An item can gather subgoals as it is being discussed, leading to separate updates within it rather than subitems. 
It would be nice if we could drag an update and drop it into the board, turning it to an item or subitem. …

posts.author: eliad (Eliad L)
posts.cookedHtml:
An item can gather subgoals as it is being discussed, leading to separate updates within it rather than subitems.
It would be nice if we could drag an update and drop it into the board, turning it to an item or subitem.
